_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: NF1-PANCO (Mir, 48% reduction; Tra, 87% reduction in %Ki67+ cells) and Sp-PANCO (Mir, 50% reduction in %Ki67+ cells)
details: 1μM concentration reduced ERK phosphorylation and caused 48% reduction in Ki67+ cells in NF1-PANCOs and 50% reduction in Sp-PANCOs
